capabilities.title: What we do under one roof

featuredServices.title: Capabilities that ship, not slideware
featuredServices.lead: Six core practices, each measured before anything goes live. Explore what a partnership looks like in each.

featuredPackages.title: Monthly social media packages
featuredPackages.lead: Managed social presence billed monthly. Change tier or cancel at the end of any month.

why.title: Built to be owned, not rented

a.title: One team, one accountability
a.body: Strategy, creative and engineering sit together, so nothing gets lost in a hand-off between agencies.

b.title: Bilingual from the first sketch
b.body: Arabic and English are designed side by side, not translated at the end. RTL is native, never retrofitted.

c.title: Measured before it ships
c.body: We take a baseline first and report against it. If something is not working, you hear it early.

d.title: You own the result
d.body: Source files, documentation and training come with every handover. No black boxes, no lock-in.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: We map the goal, the audience and the baseline before proposing anything.

design.title: Design
design.body: Concepts and scope are fixed in writing, in both languages, before build.

build.title: Build
build.body: We build in the open with regular reviews, so there are no reveal-day shocks.

handover.title: Handover
handover.body: You get the files, the documentation and the training to run it yourself.

faq.title: Questions worth asking first

a.q: Do you work in Arabic and English?
a.a: Yes. Every project is bilingual and RTL-first by default. Arabic is designed alongside English, not translated after the fact.

b.q: Is advertising spend included in your prices?
b.a: No. Ad budget is paid directly to the platform so you keep full control and visibility. Our fee is for the work, never the media.

c.q: Do I have to sign a long contract?
c.a: Monthly packages run month to month — give notice before the next cycle and they stop. Projects are fixed-scope and quoted up front.

d.a: You do, once the invoice is settled. That includes source files, documentation and, for software, the full codebase.

faq.subtitle: The questions we're asked most often, answered plainly.

a.q: Do you work in Arabic and English?
a.a: Yes. Every project is bilingual and RTL-first by default. Arabic is designed alongside English, not translated afterwards.

b.q: Is advertising spend included in your prices?
b.a: No. Ad budget is paid directly to the platform so you keep full control and visibility. Our fee is for the work, never the media.

c.q: Do I have to sign a long contract?
c.a: Monthly packages run month to month — give notice before the next cycle and they stop. Projects are fixed-scope and quoted up front.

d.a: You do, once the invoice is settled — including source files, documentation and, for software, the full codebase.

e.q: Do I need an account to buy?
e.a: No. You can browse, add to cart and check out as a guest. An account is optional and only stores your history.

f.q: How do payments work right now?
f.a: Online card payment is enabled only once a provider is configured. Until then, checkout offers bank transfer and written quotations — never a form that pretends to charge you.

cta.title: Tell us what you're building. We'll tell you honestly if we can help.
cta.subtitle: A short call, a clear scope, a written quotation. No pressure and no fake urgency.

services.title: Everything under one team
services.subtitle: Six practices, from social growth to cloud infrastructure. Each is measured before it ships and handed over so you can run it.

store.title: Packages and pricing
store.subtitle: Clear scopes and clear prices. Monthly subscriptions and one-time projects, never mixed together.
store.noAccountNeeded: No account required. Check out as a guest and create one later if you want.
store.customQuoteBody: This package is scoped and priced individually. Tell us what you need and we'll come back with a written quotation.
store.customBody: Multi-brand programmes, custom software, enterprise infrastructure — we scope these individually.

social.title: Social media management, priced clearly
social.subtitle: Four monthly tiers and an enterprise option. Change tier or cancel at the end of any month.
social.adSpendNote: Advertising spend is paid directly to the platform and is never included in the package price.

cart.title: Your selection
cart.subtitle: No account needed. Review your packages and check out as a guest.
cart.emptyBody: Browse the store and add a package to get started.
cart.quoteNotice: Your cart contains a package that is quoted individually. We'll send a written quotation rather than charge you now.
cart.guestOk: You can check out without creating an account.

auth.loginSubtitle: Access your orders, quotations and invoices.
auth.notConfigured: Accounts are not yet enabled on this deployment. Browsing, cart and guest checkout all work without one.
auth.guestBody: Browse, add to cart and check out as a guest. Create an account later if you want your order history.
auth.registerSubtitle: Optional. You can order without one.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll email you a reset link.
auth.passwordHint: At least 12 characters. Longer is better than more symbols.
auth.resetPrivacy: If an account exists for that address, we'll send a reset link. We don't reveal whether an address is registered.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you're building. We'll reply within one business day with next steps.
contact.formNote: This is a demo form. Connect a form handler or email service before going live.

about.title: A company built around ownership
about.subtitle: NOVARA brings strategy, creative and engineering under one team in Amman — so your brand, platform and growth are built by people who talk to each other.
about.storyA: NOVARA is a technology, creative and digital marketing company. We started because too many brands were stuck between a design agency, a dev shop and a media buyer who never spoke to one another.
about.storyB: So we put all three under one roof, working in Arabic and English from the first sketch. The result is fewer hand-offs, clearer accountability, and work you actually own at the end.

approach.title: One accountable team
approach.body: Strategy, creative and engineering in one place — no finger-pointing between vendors.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by default
bilingual.body: Arabic and English designed together. RTL is native, not an afterthought.

measured.title: Measured, not guessed
measured.body: We take a baseline and report against it. Honest numbers over vanity metrics.

ownership.title: You own it
ownership.body: Files, documentation and training at every handover. No lock-in.

portfolio.title: Selected concept work
portfolio.subtitle: A look at how we approach each discipline. These are concept pieces that demonstrate our standards.
portfolio.conceptNote: The pieces below are concept projects created to demonstrate our approach and quality bar. They are clearly labelled and are not presented as client work.

careers.title: Work at NOVARA
careers.subtitle: We hire people who care about craft and about telling clients the truth.
careers.openBody: We're not actively hiring, but we always like meeting thoughtful designers, engineers and strategists. Send us your work.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle the information you share with us. This is a template and should be reviewed by a lawyer before launch.

a.p: Contact details you submit through forms, and standard analytics about how the site is used. This template describes intent; wire it to your real data practices before launch.

b.p: To respond to enquiries, deliver services you request, and improve the site. We do not sell personal data.

c.p: You can request access to or deletion of your data at any time by contacting us. Analytics can be declined at the browser level.

d.p: For any privacy question, email hello@nnovara.io and we'll respond within a reasonable period.

privacy.updated: This is a template policy. Replace with reviewed legal text before going live.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms under which we provide services. This is a template and should be reviewed by a lawyer before launch.

a.p: Every engagement is defined by a written scope agreed before work begins. Anything outside it is quoted separately.

b.p: Monthly packages are billed in advance. One-time projects follow the milestone schedule in your quotation. Advertising spend is never included.

c.p: You own the final deliverables once the invoice is settled, including source files and, for software, the codebase.

d.p: Monthly packages can be cancelled at the end of any billing month with notice before the next cycle.

terms.updated: This is a template. Replace with reviewed legal text before going live.

footer.blurb: A technology, creative and digital marketing company in Amman. Strategy, creative and engineering under one team.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.guestNotice: Checking out as a guest. You can create an account afterwards using the same email.
checkout.emptyTitle: There is nothing to check out
checkout.addonsBody: These add-ons were selected with your packages.

online.title: Pay online
online.body: Card payment through our provider. You are redirected to their secure page; we never see your card details.

bank_transfer.title: Bank transfer
bank_transfer.body: We send you our bank details and an invoice. Work begins once the transfer clears.

quotation.title: Request a quotation
quotation.body: No payment now. We review your selection and send a written quotation.

checkout.noGatewayNotice: Online card payment is not enabled on this site yet. You can pay by bank transfer or request a written quotation, and we'll take it from there.
checkout.acceptTerms: I accept the terms of service
checkout.serverPriceNotice: The final amount is calculated on our server from the packages you selected. Prices here are for reference.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Nothing was charged.
errors.network: We could not reach the server. Nothing was charged.
errors.unavailable: Online payment is unavailable right now. Please choose bank transfer or request a quotation.

orderSuccess.title: Thank you
orderSuccess.lead: We have your request. Here is where it stands.
orderSuccess.noOrder: We could not find an order reference in this link.
orderSuccess.loading: Checking the status of your order…
orderSuccess.bankInstructions: We'll email our bank details and an invoice within one business day. Work begins once the transfer clears.
orderSuccess.responseTime: A named account manager replies within one business day with a kickoff plan and a written scope.

orderFailed.title: Payment was not completed
orderFailed.lead: The payment did not go through, or it was cancelled.
orderFailed.noCharge: Nothing was charged. Your cart is unchanged.
